name: l3digitalnet-plugins
description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for enhanced development workflows

plugins.name: home-assistant-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive Home Assistant integration development toolkit with 27 skills, MCP server for live HA connection, automated validation, example integrations, and project templates

plugins.name: release-pipeline
plugins.description: Interactive release pipeline: context-aware menu for quick merge, full semver release, plugin release, status checks, dry runs, and changelog preview

plugins.name: qt-suite
plugins.description: Qt development and testing toolkit: proactive specialist agents, 16 domain references, scaffolding commands, and headless GUI testing via Qt Pilot MCP for PySide6, PyQt6, and C++/Qt projects.

plugins.name: test-driver
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to proactively drive thorough testing via gap analysis, convergence loops, and persistent status tracking. Framework-agnostic core with stack-specific profiles.

plugins.name: up-docs
plugins.description: Update documentation across three layers (repo, llm-wiki, Notion) via sub-agent propagation plus drift audit, all on Sonnet. Five commands for targeted updates and comprehensive drift analysis with four-phase convergence.

plugins.name: qdev
plugins.description: Deep web research for development decisions: /research dispatches a Sonnet subagent for a dual-source sweep (Tavily-first recall, Brave/Serper cross-checks, Context7 docs gating, footgun corroboration) and persists a structured, frontmatter-indexed report under docs/research/. User-initiated only.

plugins.name: uv-strict-python
plugins.description: Python Tooling SSOT Standard: uv + Ruff + BasedPyright (strict) + pytest/coverage + pip-audit. Operationalizes a single, strict, boring toolchain that behaves identically in CLI, VS Code, and CI. Use when creating Python projects, migrating to uv, auditing conformance, or replacing legacy tooling.

plugins.name: spec-pipeline
plugins.description: Spec-driven autonomous development pipeline: author a master spec, decompose into phases, execute each phase under TDD with deterministic specpipe validator gates (structure, dependency graphs, decision-id citations, TDD step order, RED/GREEN evidence, round caps) in front of every review pass.
